name: @xi-io/gcal-readonly-adapter
description: Local Google Calendar read-only adapter (GCAL-001). No event write or calendar mutation.

scripts.check: node scripts/ensure-deps.mjs && node --check lib/response.js && node --check lib/receipts.js && node --check lib/token-store.js && node --check lib/oauth-loopback.js && node --check lib/local-data.js && node --check lib/snapshot-schema.js && node --check lib/adapter.js && node --check cli.js && node test/snapshot-schema.mjs && node test/hardening.mjs
